title: Bundle workflow (UC2) + CLI (UC3) + real-site acceptance runbook
phase: MISSION DONE. All tasks complete + verified PASS. Editing chain T2/T3/T4/T5 committed (f83c17e/dfe42b3/570f70a/bc7f557). Verification best-of-N panel: T7a authoritative run (V1-VERDICT PASS) -> T7b correctness PASS + T7c spec PASS + T7d safety PASS (parallel, read-only over T7a evidence) -> T7e synthesis VERDICT: PASS / T7-STATUS: PASS (orchestration/reports/M-003/verify.md). UC2+UC3 mock-proven (119 passed; accept_uc1/2/3 overall=pass; zip-slip all 4 rejected; netguard trips; no channel=real); real-site halves operator-gated. Handoff orchestration/handoffs/MISSION-003-handoff.json written. ESTIMATE 120m / ACTUAL ~137m (under 240m flag). Closeout commit next; NEVER push. DONE: T1a-d/T6/T2/T3/T4/T5/T7a/T7b/T7c/T7d/T7e. DEVIATIONS to fold into panel contracts: (a) T3 corrected upload reject_size_type->UploadUnsupportedError, local-cap breach stays OversizedPayloadError [T7c vs §8/§9]; (b) T4 extended tests/fixtures/mock_chatgpt/server.py for scripted patch bundles [T7d confirm loopback-only + network guard intact]; (c) T5 CLI exit-code map 0/2/3-12/1, --channel/--base-url for loopback, telemetry START-late (cosmetic).
objective: Implement UC2 (bundle workflow: zip files/dirs out with a GPT catalogue README; retrieve a changed-files-only patch bundle via download-capture PRIMARY + checksummed fenced-base64url FALLBACK; validate manifest+SHA-256+byte-count BEFORE any write; zip-slip-safe apply within caller root; round-trip diff-matches) and UC3 (ask-chatgpt CLI wrapping the public function). All mock-proven on the loopback fixture; ZERO chatgpt.com contact; real-site halves stay operator-runbook-gated. Extend M-002 stack; do NOT rebuild it.
constraints: Automated tests + ALL work NEVER contact chatgpt.com/openai; mock fixture loopback-127.0.0.1 ephemeral ONLY; no channel=real in any test/script.

PATCH APPLY SAFETY: validate ENTIRE bundle (manifest, SHA-256, byte counts, path safety) BEFORE mutating ANY file; reject absolute paths, '..', symlink escapes; write only within caller root (+ repo tmp/ in tests); CLI never mutates without explicit apply flag.
Never read/store/log credentials/cookies/tokens/profile contents. Real channel stays fail-closed.

Write ONLY inside /home/abhmul/dev/ask-chatgpt (+ tmp/). Archive /home/abhmul/Documents/weak-simplex-conjecture READ-ONLY (never archive/ or human/). Never write .claude/ or .agents/. Never touch shared agent venv (~/.local/share/agent-python/.venv).

uv sync --all-groups ALWAYS (bare uv sync drops groups). Serialize pytest in this tree. EDITING legs serialize (single editor). NO pi concurrency cap for non-editing legs. NEVER git push. ESTIMATE BEFORE EXECUTE.
Best-of-N is the DEFAULT for every non-editing leg (operator-emphasized 2026-06-12); never narrow N for resource caution.
ground_truth_anchor: README.md UC2+UC3 spec executed green end-to-end via reproducible commands (uv run pytest + scripted acceptance against the local mock-ChatGPT fixture), verified from inspected output + produced artifacts (NOT exit codes/log claims). Real-chatgpt.com proof is operator-run from runbooks, never automated.
binding_decisions: D-001 (docs/DECISIONS.md): bundle retrieval = download-capture PRIMARY + checksummed fenced-base64url FALLBACK (BEGIN/END markers, manifest, byte count, SHA-256 validated before apply); text reader DOM-primary (already built, M-002).

consumes_from_M002.fixture_bundle_affordances: tests/fixtures/mock_chatgpt/server.py serves: download_artifact (real zip + Content-Disposition; variants missing/delayed/wrong_older/corrupt/truncated/collision/unsupported) for download-capture-primary; fenced base64url payload (BEGIN/END_PATCH_BUNDLE + manifest + ZIP_BYTE_COUNT + ZIP_SHA256; variants missing_end/bad_hash/changed_and_unchanged/oversized) for fenced fallback; upload_input (<input type=file> + metadata; variants unsupported/reject_size_type/corrupt) for bundle-out.
consumes_from_M002.network_guard: autouse socket guard + Playwright route interception (tests/conftest.py, tests/test_network_guard.py) — every new test runs under it.
consumes_from_M002.existing_test_modules: tests/test_fixture_files.py exercises download/fenced/upload affordances; read it to learn the exact fixture API.
